products.title: F.R.I.E.N.D.S Mug
products.short: Handpainted mug of the iconic F.R.I.E.N.D.S TV show.
products.description: Dimensions: 3.5" diameter x 3.5" height -  material: ceramic, hand-painted with underglaze and finished with a glossy clear glaze. Dishwasher safe.

products.title: Hand-painted Rose Bowl
products.short: A delicate bowl hand-painted with roses.
products.description: This bowl is thrown and hand-painted with underglaze roses and finished with a glossy clear glaze. Dishwasher safe.

products.title: Lavender Meadow Mug
products.short: Wheel-thrown mug with hand-painted lavender stems.
products.description: Dimensions: 3.5" diameter x 3.75" height. Stoneware mug hand-painted with underglaze and finished in a glossy clear glaze. Food-safe and dishwasher safe.

products.title: Celestial Espresso Cup
products.short: Small hand-painted cup with moon and star motifs.
products.description: A hand-thrown espresso cup featuring layered celestial linework in underglaze. Clear-glazed interior and exterior. Food-safe and dishwasher safe.

products.title: Berry Breakfast Bowl
products.short: Rounded breakfast bowl with playful berry illustrations.
products.description: Dimensions: 6" diameter x 2.75" height. Hand-thrown stoneware bowl painted with berry motifs and finished with a glossy food-safe glaze.

products.title: Sunrise Teacup Set
products.short: Hand-painted teacup and saucer inspired by warm dawn colors.
products.description: A wheel-thrown teacup and matching saucer with layered warm-tone brushwork. Finished in durable clear glaze. Food-safe and dishwasher safe.

products.title: Garden Story Plate
products.short: Decorative and functional plate with botanical hand-painting.
products.description: Dimensions: 8.5" diameter. Hand-built and refined plate with botanical line art and color accents in underglaze. Food-safe, ideal for serving.

products.title: Wildflower Planter
products.short: Small ceramic planter with hand-painted floral band.
products.description: Stoneware planter with drainage hole and saucer. Hand-painted floral border and sealed with protective clear glaze. Suitable for indoor herbs and small plants.

products.title: Storyline Vase
products.short: Slim vase with illustrated narrative wrap-around design.
products.description: Dimensions: 7.5" height. Thrown and carved vase featuring a hand-painted narrative motif wrapped around the body. Glazed interior for fresh flowers.

products.title: Morning Ritual Mug
products.short: Comfortable large mug with expressive painted details.
products.description: Dimensions: 4" diameter x 4" height. Generous wheel-thrown mug with painted accents and glossy food-safe finish. Dishwasher safe.

products.title: Bloom Teapot
products.short: Hand-thrown teapot with painted floral vines and soft color accents.
products.description: Dimensions: 7" width x 5.5" height. Stoneware teapot with hand-painted floral detailing, fitted lid, and food-safe glossy glaze. Designed for daily tea rituals.

products.title: Evening Serving Platter
products.short: Oval serving platter with illustrated border and hand-finished rim.
products.description: Dimensions: 11" x 8". Hand-built platter featuring underglaze illustration and a durable clear glaze. Food-safe and perfect for serving shared meals.

products.title: Studio Mug Collection
products.short: Assorted hand-painted mugs in a playful studio lineup.
products.description: A curated set of hand-painted ceramic mugs featuring colorful illustrated motifs. Each mug is food-safe, functional, and made for everyday use.

products.title: Winter Black Mug Set
products.short: Dark-toned hand-painted mugs with seasonal character details.
products.description: Wheel-thrown ceramic mugs with hand-painted artwork over a dark glaze base. Durable, food-safe, and designed for warm winter drinks.

products.title: Hand-painted Teapots Collection
products.short: A collection of functional teapots with illustrated surfaces.
products.description: Handmade ceramic teapots with hand-painted decorative details and fitted lids. Designed for daily tea rituals and serving.

products.description: A reusable tote bag hand-painted with original artwork by Tea Pupkova. Each piece is one of a kind and designed for everyday use.
